# Eaton

**Category:** Modular / Prefabricated, Power Infrastructure  
**Website:** https://www.eaton.com/

## Headline
Major electrical and power infrastructure vendor relevant to modular and data center deployments.

## Overview
Eaton is especially relevant where buyers are evaluating the electrical backbone of AI infrastructure projects. In modular and high-density environments, power distribution, resiliency, and supporting infrastructure are central to project feasibility, making Eaton a useful vendor to track in both modular and electrical categories.

## Key capabilities
- electrical infrastructure
- backup and power systems
- relevance to modular and enterprise deployments

## Best fit for
- buyers focused on power constraints
- enterprise and data center infrastructure planning
- projects where electrical readiness is a major gating issue
